ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Cancelled, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "fulfillment_method" TEXT /* Method of fulfillment (e.g., Easy Ship, Amazon) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel where the order was placed (e.g., Amazon.in) */,
  "ship_service_level" TEXT /* Level of shipping service (e.g., Standard, Expedited) */,
  "courier_status" TEXT /* Status of the courier (e.g., Cancelled, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "b2b_order" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the order is a B2B order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the order */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the order */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the order */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_courier_status FOREIGN KEY ("courier_status") REFERENCES couriers ("courier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name for B2B orders */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number for B2B orders */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order containing the item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount for the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the inventory */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status of the item (e.g., Not Returned, Returned, Refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_promotions" (
  "order_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order promotion */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order */,
  "promotion_id" TEXT /* Reference to the promotion */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was applied to the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_promotions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the shipping address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the shipping address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the shipping address */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the default shipping address for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "couriers" (
  "courier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each courier */,
  "courier_name" TEXT /* Name of the courier service */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the courier service */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the courier service */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* URL for tracking the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("courier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status change or update */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User who made the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log entry was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
